rulings.Case Title: JANEVA CHIANG et al VS. NADER HEYDAYIAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Req. A Detailed Breakdown Of Receipts In "Memo Of Costs" And A Mtn To Charge Deft For Failure To Provide Receipts Timely
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 12, 2014, Line 3: PLAINTIFFS JANEVA CHIANG, HERO CHIANG and GREATWALLS CHIANG's Motion to Request A Detailed Breakdown Of Receipts In "Memo Of Costs" And A Motion To Charge Defendant For Failure To Provide Receipts Timely: DENIED. Defendant's Request for Dismissal is GRANTED. The Court awards the court costs requested.

rulings.Case Title: JANEVA CHIANG et al VS. NADER HEYDAYIAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Strike The Memo Of Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 12, 2014, Line 3: PLAINTIFFS JANEVA CHIANG, HERO CHIANG and GREATWALLS CHIANG Motion To Strike The Memo Of Costs: DENIED. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KENT N. MIRKHANI et al VS. CROSSROADS TRADING CO. INC. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT /Adjudication And Exhibits In Support
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 12, 2014, Line 4: CROSS DEFENDANTS KENT MIRKHANI and DANIEL KERN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT/Adjudication: DENIED. Cross-Complainant has provided sufficient evidence to show triable issues of material fact on its quiet title action under either a prescriptive or implied easement theory. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH CHUNG VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 12, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANTS BANK OF AMERICA, and FEDERAL HOME LOAN MORTGAGE CORPORATION's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT: OVERRULED in part and SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND in part. Demurrer to Thirteenth Cause of Action is OVERRULED as P has pled sufficient facts to show harassment and threats. Demurrer to Second, Seventh, Eighth, and Eleventh Cause of Action is SUSTAINED. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN PAPPAGEORGE VS. MARTIN V MURPHY JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses To: Demand For Identification And Production Of Documents To Cary Dunne, Set One; Special Interrogatories To Cary Dunne Set One; Form Interrogatories Set One; For An Order To Deem Certain Requests For Admissions Of Fact Admitted; And For Santions Against Deft
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 12, 2014, Line 6: PLAINTIFF JOHN PAPPAGEORGE'S Motion To Compel Responses To Demand For Identification And Production Of Documents; Special Interrogatories; Form Interrogatories; For An Order To Deem Certain Requests For Admissions Of Fact Admitted; And For Santions: GRANTED. The Court imposes sanctions in the amount of $910. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN PAPPAGEORGE VS. MARTIN V MURPHY JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Compel Third Party Witness
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 12, 2014, Line 6: PLAINTIFF JOHN PAPPAGEORGE'S Motion To Compel Third Party Witness compliance with subpoena: GRANTED. The Court imposes sanctions in the amount of $60. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN PAPPAGEORGE VS. MARTIN V MURPHY JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions And Additional Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 12, 2014, Line 6: PLAINTIFF JOHN PAPPAGEORGE'S Motion For Terminating Sanctions And Additional Monetary Sanctions: DENIED IN PART and GRANTED IN PART. The Court will not impose terminating sanctions since such sanctions are to be used sparingly but will impose monetary sanctions in the amount of $1,292.50. (See R.S. Creative, Inc. v. Creative Cotton, Ltd. (1999) 75 Cal.App.4th 486.) (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID GREENE et al VS. PARK LANE ASSOCIATES LP, et al

rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 12, 2014, Line 8: DEFENDANTS PACIFIC COURT INC, WENG SIU and SHIRLEY SIU'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OFF CALENDAR. Parties have reported that they have settled. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RICHARD FRAIGE et al VS. THE NEW PIGALLE LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 12, 2014, Line 9: DEFENDANT NEW PIGALLE, INC's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND: DENIED. Defendant failed to sufficiently show that his failure to timely file a responsive pleading was a result of counsel's excusable neglect. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DLD I GROUP LLC VS. STEVEN STUART ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Nad Motion For Order Compelling Defenant Steven Stuart To Respond To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories And Deem Matters Admitted, And Imposing Monetary Sanctions

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. MICHAEL ROBINSON ET AL
